description: Curated corpus of checked-in documentation and structured guides for the Unsloth_Core repository workflow assistant

questions.prompt: What is the Unsloth_Core project about?
How do I install the project dependencies and activate the environment?
What are the main stages of the NPC pipeline?
What CLI tool does this project use and how do I see available commands?
What LLM models are supported for training?
Where do NPC subject specs live and what format are they in?
What are the 7 stages of the NPC training pipeline?
Which generation techniques are available for creating NPC datasets?
What is the difference between template, docs, and ollama generation techniques?
How should GGUF exports be named?
What are the 5 dataset categories and how many examples per category?
What training presets are available and when should I use each?
How do I validate generation inputs before creating a dataset?
What is a knowledge gap and how are training_density and knowledge_gap different?
Where can I find prebuilt CUDA binaries for llama.cpp?
Describe the full training pipeline from spec to GGUF export.
What configuration hierarchy does Unsloth_Core use?
What does the --from-spec flag do during training?
How do I run a full dataset quality gate evaluation with DeepEval?
What happens during the sanitization stage?
How does the feedback loop identify weak concepts and what gap types can it find?
What is the difference between adapter-only GGUF export and full-merge export?
How do I evaluate a model with --lora support using llama-server?
What is the directory layout of the project?
Where are training outputs and exports stored?
What Python scripts are responsible for each pipeline stage?
How does the project handle configuration via YAML?
What is the purpose of reference docs in the NPC pipeline?
What are the minimum requirements for a valid reference document primer?
How should reference docs be structured and where do they live?
What RL dataset schemas exist but are not yet implemented?
What is the contract for preference pair data?
How do I start the frontend dashboard server?
What are the main features of the training dashboard?
How do I view real-time training logs in the dashboard?
